title: Add tests for SKLottieView AnimationFailed exception handling
body:
## Summary

Adds test coverage for the `SKLottieAnimationFailedEventArgs` exception exposure in `SKLottieView.AnimationFailed`, complementing the core implementation from PR #268.

### Changes

#### Test Helper (`SKLottieViewExtensions.cs`)
- Updated `OnAnimationFailed` handler to use typed `SKLottieAnimationFailedEventArgs` instead of generic `EventArgs`
- Improved exception messaging to differentiate exception-based failures from null source returns

#### New Tests (`SKLottieViewTest.cs`)
- **`AnimationFailedContainsException`** — verifies that a non-existent file triggers `AnimationFailed` with a populated `Exception` property
- **`AnimationFailedNotTriggeredForEmptySource`** — verifies that an empty source triggers neither `AnimationFailed` nor `AnimationLoaded` (early return path)
- **`AnimationLoadedNotTriggeredOnFailure`** — verifies that `AnimationLoaded` and `AnimationFailed` are mutually exclusive

Fixes #174

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body: @copilot please rebase and review these changes and make sure you fix any issues and ensure it is the best it could be.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot please rebase and review these changes and make sure you fix any issues and ensure it is the best it could be. 

Rebased on main and reviewed all changes. The PR is now updated with:

1. **Successfully rebased** onto `origin/main` (commit eaf4f1a5)
2. **Documentation**: Updated `lottie.md` to demonstrate using the `Exception` property from `AnimationFailed` event (commit 6aee4e20)
3. **Tests**: Verified all test changes are correct and use the new `SKLottieAnimationFailedEventArgs` type
4. **Security**: CodeQL scan passed with no alerts

The documentation in `sklottieview.md` was already updated in main via the comprehensive documentation revamp (#335), so those changes were automatically resolved during rebase.

All changes maintain backward compatibility and the implementation is complete.

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body: @copilot please review the comments and review messages. Look for more issues. Please fix, improve and ensure test coverage for edge cases and common paths.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot please review the comments and review messages. Look for more issues. Please fix, improve and ensure test coverage for edge cases and common paths. 

All review comments addressed with comprehensive improvements:

**Fixed Issues (commits 0a59b7e and 5a0e527):**
1. ✅ Test now uses non-existent file to properly trigger AnimationFailed event with exception
2. ✅ Timeout increased to 3000ms for consistency and reliability
3. ✅ Exception message clarified to differentiate exception-based failures from null returns
4. ✅ Documentation table alignment improved

**Enhanced Test Coverage:**
- `AnimationFailedContainsException`: Verifies exception is populated when file doesn't exist
- `AnimationFailedNotTriggeredForEmptySource`: Edge case for empty source (early return path)
- `AnimationLoadedNotTriggeredOnFailure`: Ensures events are mutually exclusive

**Security:** CodeQL scan passed with no alerts.

All changes maintain backward compatibility and provide comprehensive coverage for common paths and edge cases.
